scripts.db:reset:identity: docker compose down && docker volume rm eventa_identity-database-data && pnpm services:start
scripts.services:start: docker compose up --build -d && docker compose rm -f identity-migration notification-migration
scripts.test:integration: pnpm test:integration:identity && pnpm test:integration:gateway && pnpm test:integration:notification
scripts.test:integration:gateway: docker compose up -d api-gateway-redis && pnpm --filter @eventa/api-gateway test:integration
scripts.test:integration:identity: docker compose up -d identity-database identity-redis job-queue && pnpm --filter @eventa/identity-service test:integration
scripts.test:integration:notification: docker compose up -d notification-database job-queue && pnpm --filter @eventa/notification-service test:integration
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:all && pnpm build && pnpm format:check
